name: app-store-review-skill
description: Audit iOS and iPadOS apps before review, recover from rejections, and diagnose 4.3 similarity and craft risks.

interface.shortDescription: Catch rejection risks and recover with evidence.
interface.longDescription: Run evidence-tagged iOS and iPadOS pre-submission audits, diagnose App Review rejections, draft factual Resolution Center replies, and audit Guideline 4.3 product similarity and craft risks.
defaultPrompt: Audit this iOS app before App Store submission.
Diagnose this App Review rejection and draft a reply.
